steps.title: Identify the stated limitation
steps.content: The passage explicitly describes the drawback: data from the Places API are restricted to places that are customer facing. This restriction is the key signal to match against the answer choices.

steps.title: Match to the correct answer
steps.content: A states the method may lead to conclusions not reflective of all amenities—a direct consequence when your data only includes customer-facing businesses. B, C, and D introduce problems the passage never mentions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
